description: A faithful Codex pet recreation of the provided mecha kitty reference: a round cream-and-black mechanical guardian cat with a thick warm-white fluffy neck ruff, a round brass side hatch, a black head patch, a black body patch, and a short thick tail with a dark tip. Quiet, gentle, reliable, and slightly dopey in a protective way.

unmappedRequestedActions.play: No dedicated row in the fixed 8x9 atlas. Priority was given to idle, walk_right, walk_left, curious, happy, sleep, drag, patrol, alert, and loaf.

identityReadabilityChecklist: small round head with a simple gentle face
tall round barrel body with thick proportions
cream and warm-ivory main body with black head and body patches
thick warm-white fluffy neck ruff remains visible at small size
round brass-and-warm-gray side hatch remains readable at small size
short thick tail with dark tip remains visible in both standing and curled poses

dragFacingValidation.manualReview: Confirmed from final contact-sheet QA that row 2 is true left-facing and row 1 is true right-facing; the head, eyes, body angle, side hatch, body patch, tail curve, and stepping direction all align with the drag direction.
